description: table_name= appears in a migration file adding a legacy alias — not a production model violation
input:
class CreateLegacyMirrorTable < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.2]
  def change
    # Creates a view aliasing tbl_blog_entries for the new Post model;
    # self.table_name = 'tbl_blog_entries' used only in migration context
    execute <<~SQL
      CREATE VIEW posts AS SELECT * FROM tbl_blog_entries
    SQL
  end
end
